_note: UTGSU Executive Committee portfolios from Bylaw 7 (amended Dec 2024). 'keywords' drive automatic matching of governance items to each exec. Edit keywords to tune what shows up under each portfolio. Matching is case-insensitive substring on each meeting's text (summary, items, document summaries).

execs.blurb: Chief Executive Officer and official spokesperson. Coordinates relations with the Office of the President, Vice-Provost Students, and Governing Council and its committees (with VP Academics); strategic plan; human resources; Course Unions and graduate student groups.

Academic campaigns and advocacy; graduate funding, grants and awards; academic unit funding and the funding complaints process; academic appeals; student–supervisor relationships. Explicitly monitors the Academic Board, Business Board and University Affairs Board.
watch: Committee on Academic Policy and Programs

execs.blurb: Municipal, provincial and federal government and community advocacy; relations with sibling students' unions and labour unions on and off campus; Canadian Federation of Students; partner advocacy coalitions; satellite-campus engagement.

Chief Financial Officer; financial planning and oversight; annual budget and audit; Health and Dental Plan; levy groups; bursaries and grants; service programs (tax clinics, discounts). Oversight of UTGSU services.

Graduate student life programming and advocacy; orientation and welcome-back; programming in the UTGSU building; mental health and wellness; relations with SGS Grad Life, Grad House, Hart House, Athletics & Recreation, and Council of Student Services.

Oversight of governance documents and minutes; planning of governance meetings; General Meetings; appointment processes (Chair, Equity Officer, Board of Appeal); maintaining Bylaws and Policies; Caucuses; Course Union governance support.
